title: SKC-600 ternary: split engram (packed-lite + eval) and harden build pipeline
author: Akhilesh-Gogikar

data.description: Adds an EngramHash-style learned hash embedding table for token n-gram statistics, with a packed-lite training/export path and a separate eval-time engram.
Adds EvalEngram, a VRAM-resident evaluation-time engram that applies entropy-gated additive logit correction and is designed to stack with Legal TTT.
Hardens the submission build pipeline with DCE extraction, unused-import pruning, and py_compile smoke testing after extraction.

novel_contributions: Split EngramHash into a packed-lite training/export path and a separate eval-time EvalEngram
Entropy-gated additive logit correction from a VRAM-resident eval engram
Freeze/restore of packed engram tables during evaluation to prevent TTT drift
Build pipeline hardening with DCE, unused-import pruning, and py_compile smoke checks
Cleanup of stale root scripts and archival of competition ablation/orchestration records
